summary: Iteration 67: CRITICAL 429 RESILIENCE FIX VERIFIED. Dark theme loads from SSR with no white flash. All fixes working: <html class='dark'> from SSR, theme blocking script, inline CSS with !important, footer SVGs capped at 16px, sr-only properly hidden. Theme toggle working with localStorage persistence.

critical_code_review_comments: layout.tsx: <html> has class='dark' from SSR - ensures dark bg before any JS runs
layout.tsx: Theme blocking script correctly only removes 'dark' if user explicitly chose 'light'
layout.tsx: Inline CSS uses !important for background - cannot be overridden by external stylesheets
layout.tsx: Footer SVG constraint (16px !important) prevents giant icons if CSS fails
ThemeContext.tsx: Defaults to 'dark' theme, properly syncs with localStorage
context_for_next_testing_agent: 429 resilience fix verified. Dark theme SSR'd via <html class='dark'>. Theme blocking script prevents white flash for returning users. Inline CSS with !important ensures dark bg even if external CSS fails. All pages load correctly. Admin credentials: admin/lexa2026.
